title: lycopodium annotinum f. angustatum
intro: Lycopodium annotinum f. angustatum, also known as club moss, is a type of evergreen plant belonging to the Lycopodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. Lycopodium annotinum f. angustatum can be prepared into herbal supplements, tinctures, and teas to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
